svg.title: Makthab Management System — React + TypeScript Architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram: React frontend, TypeScript/Node API, Prisma ORM, SQLite/PostgreSQL storage, and external services.
svg.text: Browser — React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS (dir="rtl" native Arabic support)
Frontend layer — React components + state + HTTP client
API + business logic layer — Node.js · TypeScript · Express (or NestJS)
ORM layer — Prisma (schema.prisma = single source of truth)
Optional: Electron shell — wraps the full stack as a desktop app (no browser required, offline-first)
